[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000100 2
1 000000011 2
2 000001000 1
3 001010000 2
4 001000100 2
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a

01 10 100001000 2
12 21 100001100 3
23 32 001001100 3
34 43 000000000 a match 5 6 7

56 65 001010001 3
67 76 001010001 3
70 07 101000001 3

13 31 000001100 2
24 42 000010000 1

46 64 000010001 2
57 75 001010001 3
60 06 001000001 2
71 17 100100100 3

03 30 001001000 2
14 41 000000000 a match 5 6 7
25 52 001011000 3
36 63 001000000 1
47 74 000010001 2
50 05 001001011 4
61 16 000000000 a match 5 6 7
72 27 101010100 4

04 40 000000011 2 match 1
15 51 000001000 1 match 2
26 62 001010000 2 match 3
37 73 001000100 2 match 0 4
